whatibuild.label: Capabilities
whatibuild.title: What I Build
whatibuild.description: Systems where structured intelligence and human decision-making intersect.
whatibuild.card1.title: AI Decision Support
whatibuild.card1.description: ESC clinical guidelines encoded into interactive rule engines. Patient inputs processed through structured safety gates — generating personalized therapy considerations while preserving full clinician autonomy.
whatibuild.card2.title: Automation Systems
whatibuild.card2.description: End-to-end workflow automation for operations, communications, and data pipelines — built to scale cleanly.
whatibuild.card3.title: Digital Health Tools
whatibuild.card3.description: Patient-facing and clinical digital tools — screening instruments, monitoring dashboards, health applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Production tools and systems built for real-world clinical and operational use.
projects.page.label: Portfolio
projects.page.description: Production AI systems and tools — clinical decision support, digital health instruments, and operational automation.

labs.page.description: Experimental AI projects — prototypes, proofs-of-concept, and novel ideas being explored in the open.
labs.note: Lab projects are experimental by nature — expect rough edges, breaking changes, and incomplete documentation.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: Interested in collaborating on AI systems, clinical decision support, or automation projects?
contact.p2: I'm open to consulting engagements, research collaborations, and conversations about applying AI to complex decision environments.
